title: Camera lens module with autofocus actuator
abstract: A compact camera module including a lens assembly, a voice-coil autofocus actuator, and an image sensor that captures focused images for a mobile device.
claims: A camera module comprising: a lens assembly; an autofocus actuator configured to move the lens assembly along an optical axis; and an image sensor configured to capture an image formed by the lens assembly.
The module of claim 1, wherein the autofocus actuator comprises a voice coil motor.
The module of claim 1, further comprising an optical image stabilization unit.
source: DEMO FIXTURE (synthetic, not a real patent)
notes: Synthetic demo sample (unrelated domain) for the triage UI; not a real USPTO record.
